entry.title: It's Quieter in the Twilight
entry.quote: In an unremarkable office space, a select group of aging engineers find themselves at the leading edge of discovery. Fighting outdated technology and time, Voyager's flight-team pursues humankind's greatest exploration.

entry.title: Five medical breakthroughs in 2024
entry.quote: Here I’ve highlighted five medical treatments that have shown high efficacy in (often multiple) phase three randomized controlled trials, which are large, rigorous, and receive much closer independent oversight. I’ve chosen medical treatments whose results were published in 2024.

entry.title: How a simple math error sparked a panic about black plastic kitchen utensils
entry.quote: But 60 times 7,000 is not 42,000. It is 420,000. This is what Joe Schwarcz noticed. The estimated exposure is not even a tenth of the reference dose.

entry.title: How “Star Trek” Helped Make Midcentury-Modern the Signature Sci-Fi Aesthetic
entry.quote: Given that it was set more than 100 years before the original in the mid-22nd century, the (now) retro-futuristic aesthetic Star Trek helped cultivate through its use of midcentury-modern designs still pops up in 21st-century sci-fi depictions, from Blade Runner: 2049 to episodes of Black Mirror.
